data.title: Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. Announces 7th AGM
data.description:
Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. (AU:SEC) has released an update.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited is set to hold its seventh Annual General Meeting on November 19, 2024, both in person and online. Shareholders are encouraged to participate in the vote on key resolutions, including the adoption of the Remuneration Report and the re-election of Director Matt Booker. Attendees will also receive an investment update and a Spheria branded umbrella as a token of appreciation.

For further insights into AU:SEC stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Control Bionics Ltd. Issues Unquoted Equity Securities
data.description:
Control Bionics Ltd. (AU:CBL) has released an update.

Control Bionics Ltd. has announced the issuance of over 8 million unquoted equity securities, set to expire in October 2026. This move is part of a previously announced transaction that remains unquoted on the ASX. Such developments could influence the company’s stock performance and attract investor attention.

data.title: ActivEX Limited Launches Gilberton Gold Drilling Project
data.description:
ActivEX Limited (AU:AIV) has released an update.

ActivEX Limited has commenced a significant drilling operation at its Gilberton Gold Project, targeting the historic Mt Hogan Mine with a 3,175-meter program. This initiative aims to establish a maiden JORC resource and potentially expand gold reserves in the area, leveraging past mining successes. The project kickstarts a new phase of exploration, reflecting ActivEX’s commitment to unlocking gold potential and delivering value to shareholders.

For further insights into AU:AIV stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks Australian Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Rex Minerals Acquisition by MACH Metals Approved
data.description:
Rex Minerals Limited (AU:RXM) has released an update.

Rex Minerals Limited has announced that its acquisition scheme by MACH Metals Australia Pty Ltd has been legally approved by the Federal Court of Australia, leading to a suspension of Rex shares on the ASX. Shareholders will receive compensation for their shares by 30 October 2024, following the scheme’s implementation. Investors should watch for any updates on the timing from Rex on the ASX.

For further insights into AU:RXM stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Australian Ethical Boosts Stake in Eroad Limited
data.description:
EROAD (ERDLF) has released an update.

Australian Ethical Investment Limited has increased its stake in Eroad Limited, raising its holding from 12.73% to 13.96% through multiple on-market transactions. This change in substantial holding reflects a strategic move by the investment firm, suggesting increased confidence in the company’s prospects.

data.title: Island Pharmaceuticals to Quote New Shares on ASX
data.description:
Island Pharmaceuticals Ltd (AU:ILA) has released an update.

Island Pharmaceuticals Ltd has announced the issuance of 115,580 fully paid ordinary shares, which are set to be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange. This move follows the exercise of options and conversion of convertible securities, indicating potential growth and increasing investor confidence in the company’s prospects.

data.title: Aurum Resources Announces Takeover of Mako Gold
data.description:
Mako Gold Limited (AU:MKG) has released an update.

Aurum Resources Limited has announced a recommended takeover of Mako Gold Limited, marking a strategic move in the mining sector. This agreement, authorized by the boards of both companies, highlights Aurum’s continued expansion and influence in the market. Investors in both companies will be keenly watching the developments as the integration unfolds.

data.title: C29 Metals Set to Begin Drilling at Ulytau Uranium Project
data.description:
C29 Metals Limited (AU:C29) has released an update.

C29 Metals Limited has received the green light to begin drilling at its Ulytau Uranium project in Kazakhstan, following the fulfillment of all regulatory requirements. The company is set to commence an initial diamond drilling program targeting key mineralization near the surface, with strong local community support bolstering their efforts. This development highlights Kazakhstan’s favorable operating environment for mining activities.

data.title: CCIAM Future Energy to Appoint New Auditors
data.description:
CCIAM Future Energy Ltd. (HK:0145) has released an update.

CCIAM Future Energy Ltd. has announced an extraordinary general meeting to appoint Prism Hong Kong Limited as its new auditors after the resignation of HLB Hodgson Impey Cheng Limited. This move is significant for investors as it could impact the company’s future financial disclosures and performance assessments.

data.title: Titomic Ltd Expands Operations to the U.S.
data.description:
Titomic Ltd (AU:TTT) has released an update.

Titomic Ltd, a pioneer in cold spray technology, is making significant strides by expanding its operations to the U.S. This move aims to enhance its reach in advanced manufacturing, providing innovative solutions that help industries meet their critical objectives. Investors and market enthusiasts may find this expansion an intriguing development in the evolving manufacturing sector.
